name: GOLFTEC Troy
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction. Using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, their certified coaches help golfers of all skill levels improve their swing and game. The studio offers structured lessons, practice memberships, and professional club fitting services, providing a comprehensive improvement experience with measurable results. Their approach combines personalized coaching with real-time data feedback to help students achieve their golf goals through detailed swing analysis and targeted training plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION, high-speed video, and launch monitors provides precise swing feedback
Certified PGA coaches offer personalized, data-driven instruction for measurable improvement
Professional club fitting services optimize equipment for better performance and distance

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned, likely SkyTrak based on context and equipment listings

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings, though students may use their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No mention of food or drink service; studio appears focused on instruction with no on-site dining facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not applicable as GOLFTEC is a training studio with simulator technology focused on practice and lessons, not full 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and youth instruction, making it suitable for young golfers, though specific age requirements may vary by location.
